steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate project state (tasks, suggestions, costs) and present to researcher.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured discussion with researcher; agree on 5-task literature-survey wave and budget bump.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Write 5 suggestions, create 5 child task folders (t0015-t0019), bump project/budget.json.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, session capture, run verificators, PR, merge.
